_comment: Permalink stability for /archive/[date]. Locked-in by /plan-eng-review 2026-05-11 D11. Populated by scripts/freeze_archive.py during the crawl.yml run for any date with (today - date) >= 7 days. Once a date is frozen, getDailyArchive() overrides the score-based pickRepresentative with the frozen entry — investors who cite /archive/2026-04-12 keep getting the same headline 5 years later. Initial state: empty {} (PR2 ships day 0; entries accumulate naturally over the next 8 days). Do not edit by hand. Schema: { 'YYYY-MM-DD': { 'frozen_at': ISO8601 UTC, 'representative_url': str, 'representative_headline': str } }
